description_long: This object is a carousel-style kiosk with a large, tented roof featuring alternating pink and white panels and a decorative golden finial at the peak. The roof is supported by a circular base with a wooden platform, bordered by a beveled edge. Around the perimeter of the platform, several white carousel horses with pastel-colored saddles and manes are mounted on vertical poles, suggesting a whimsical, amusement-park theme. The structure is open on all sides, allowing clear visibility and access to the horses beneath the canopy. The overall design is festive and inviting, with a nostalgic, fairground aesthetic. The materials appear to be primarily wood for the base, metal for the poles, and fabric or painted panels for the roof.
description: A whimsical carousel kiosk with a pink and white tented roof, wooden platform, and decorative carousel horses mounted on poles around the perimeter.
description_view_0: The front view shows the pink and white tented roof, wooden platform, and several carousel horses clearly visible beneath the canopy.
description_view_1: This view is similar to the front, with the horses and tented roof visible, but the angle slightly shifts the perspective of the horses' arrangement.
description_view_2: The tented roof and platform remain prominent, with a different set of carousel horses more visible from this angle.
description_view_3: This view highlights the opposite side of the carousel, showing the horses and the structure's symmetry under the tented roof.
attribute_roof_design: Sloped, tented roof with alternating pink and white panels and a decorative golden finial at the peak.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional fairground or amusement park style with whimsical, nostalgic influences.
